scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:]; [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
